title: phanera wrayi
intro: Phanera wrayi is a type of tree in the family Moraceae, native to parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Research has indicated that Phanera wrayi may have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or tea, and its extracts can also be found in various supplements and traditional remedies.
